top_findings.summary: The skill description claims to be a "Lightweight Haiku sub-agent for cleaning up C# code" but then references using "Gemini Flash via delegation_bridge" and shows usage examples for JavaScript/Python/Go/Rust formatting with external tools (Prettier, ESLint, Black). This suggests the skill may delegate code to external AI services (Gemini Flash) or upload code to third-party formatting servers without clear disclosure about where user code is sent, creating privacy concerns for proprietary source code. Additionally, the inconsistency between stated C# focus and multi-language examples raises questions about actual data handling.
